title: What the Fur, Europe? [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The article argues that the European Commission’s plan to adopt “welfare standards” instead of a ban on fur farming disregards public demand, scientific evidence and EU law, exposing political and policy inconsistencies and how the Union undermines its foundational values.
summary_public: The article argues that the European Commission’s plan to adopt “welfare standards” instead of a ban on fur farming disregards public demand, scientific evidence and EU law, exposing political and policy inconsistencies…
